channel.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Sep 5th, 2022
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • JAXFitstars10 - Accelerated curve fitting library for nonlinear least-squares problems (see arXiv paper).

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Sep 3rd, 2022
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • Eqxvisionstars47 - Equinox version of Torchvision.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Sep 2nd, 2022
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • Jumanjistars159 - A Suite of Industry-Driven Hardware-Accelerated RL Environments written in JAX.
  • GPJaxstars156 - Gaussian processes in JAX.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Aug 31st, 2022
item.description:
Models and Projects

Flax

  • Sharpened Cosine Similarity in JAX by Raphael Pisoni - A JAX/Flax implementation of the Sharpened Cosine Similarity layer.

    • Tutorials and Blog Posts

  • Writing a Training Loop in JAX + FLAX by Saurav Maheshkar and Soumik Rakshit - A tutorial on writing a simple end-to-end training and evaluation pipeline in JAX, Flax and Optax.
  • Implementing NeRF in JAX by Soumik Rakshit and Saurav Maheshkar - A tutorial on 3D volumetric rendering of scenes represented by Neural Radiance Fields in JAX.
  • Deep Learning tutorials with JAX+Flax by Phillip Lippe - A series of notebooks explaining various deep learning concepts, from basics (e.g. intro to JAX/Flax, activiation functions) to recent advances (e.g., Vision Transformers, SimCLR), with translations to PyTorch.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Aug 26th, 2022
item.description:
Books

  • Jax in Action - A hands-on guide to using JAX for deep learning and other mathematically-intensive applications.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Aug 9th, 2022
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • jwavestars33 - A library for differentiable acoustic simulations

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Jun 28th, 2022
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • Mctxstars453 - Monte Carlo tree search algorithms in native JAX.
  • KFAC-JAXstars76 - Second Order Optimization with Approximate Curvature for NNs.
  • TF2JAXstars54 - Convert functions/graphs to JAX functions.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Jun 25th, 2022
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • gymnaxstars239 - Reinforcement Learning Environments with the well-known gym API.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Mar 15th, 2022
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • tinygpstars166 - The tiniest of Gaussian process libraries in JAX.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Mar 14th, 2022
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • Einshapestars60 - DSL-based reshaping library for JAX and other frameworks.
  • ALX - Open-source library for distributed matrix factorization using Alternating Least Squares, more info in ALX: Large Scale Matrix Factorization on TPUs.
  • Diffraxstars640 - Numerical differential equation solvers in JAX.

    • Models and Projects

    JAX

  • Symbolic Functionals - Demonstration from Evolving symbolic density functionals.
  • TriMap - Official JAX implementation of TriMap: Large-scale Dimensionality Reduction Using Triplets.

    • Models and Projects

    Flax

  • mip-NeRFstars568 - Official implementation of Mip-NeRF: A Multiscale Representation for Anti-Aliasing Neural Radiance Fields.
  • RegNeRF - Official implementation of RegNeRF: Regularizing Neural Radiance Fields for View Synthesis from Sparse Inputs.
  • ARDM - Official implementation of Autoregressive Diffusion Models.
  • D3PM - Official implementation of Structured Denoising Diffusion Models in Discrete State-Spaces.
  • Gumbel-max Causal Mechanisms - Code for Learning Generalized Gumbel-max Causal Mechanisms, with extra code in GuyLor/gumbel_max_causal_gadgets_part2stars0.
  • Latent Programmer - Code for the ICML 2021 paper Latent Programmer: Discrete Latent Codes for Program Synthesis.
  • SNeRG - Official implementation of Baking Neural Radiance Fields for Real-Time View Synthesis.
  • Spin-weighted Spherical CNNs - Adaptation of Spin-Weighted Spherical CNNs.
  • VDVAE - Adaptation of Very Deep VAEs Generalize Autoregressive Models and Can Outperform Them on Images, original code at openai/vdvaestars361.
  • MUSIQ - Checkpoints and model inference code for the ICCV 2021 paper MUSIQ: Multi-scale Image Quality Transformer
  • AQuaDem - Official implementation of Continuous Control with Action Quantization from Demonstrations.
  • Combiner - Official implementation of Combiner: Full Attention Transformer with Sparse Computation Cost.
  • Dreamfields - Official implementation of the ICLR 2022 paper Progressive Distillation for Fast Sampling of Diffusion Models.
  • GIFT - Official implementation of Gradual Domain Adaptation in the Wild:When Intermediate Distributions are Absent.
  • Light Field Neural Rendering - Official implementation of Light Field Neural Rendering.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Feb 24th, 2022
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • SymJAXstars104 - Symbolic CPU/GPU/TPU programming.
  • mcxstars326 - Express & compile probabilistic programs for performant inference.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Feb 22nd, 2022
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • evosaxstars197 - JAX-Based Evolution Strategies

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Feb 18th, 2022
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • EvoJAXstars560 - Hardware-Accelerated Neuroevolution

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Feb 12th, 2022
item.description:
Tutorials and Blog Posts

  • Get started with JAX by Aleksa Gordićstars337 - A series of notebooks and videos going from zero JAX knowledge to building neural networks in Haiku.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Feb 11th, 2022
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • PGMaxstars58 - A framework for building discrete Probabilistic Graphical Models (PGM's) and running inference inference on them via JAX.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Jan 24th, 2022
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • tree-mathstars131 - Convert functions that operate on arrays into functions that operate on PyTrees.
  • jax-modelsstars98 - Implementations of research papers originally without code or code written with frameworks other than JAX.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Jan 3rd, 2022
item.description:
Tutorials and Blog Posts

  • Introduction to JAX by Kevin Murphy - Colab that introduces various aspects of the language and applies them to simple ML problems.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Nov 13th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • JaxDFstars58 - Framework for differentiable simulators with arbitrary discretizations.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Sep 12th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • bayexstars34 - Bayesian Optimization powered by JAX.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Jul 30th, 2021
item.description:
Models and Projects

JAX

  • Amortized Bayesian Optimization - Code related to Amortized Bayesian Optimization over Discrete Spaces.
  • Accurate Quantized Training - Tools and libraries for running and analyzing neural network quantization experiments in JAX and Flax.
  • BNN-HMC - Implementation for the paper What Are Bayesian Neural Network Posteriors Really Like?.
  • JAX-DFT - One-dimensional density functional theory (DFT) in JAX, with implementation of Kohn-Sham equations as regularizer: building prior knowledge into machine-learned physics.
  • Robust Loss - Reference code for the paper A General and Adaptive Robust Loss Function.

    • Models and Projects

    Flax

  • Performer - Flax implementation of the Performer (linear transformer via FAVOR+) architecture.
  • JaxNeRF - Implementation of NeRF: Representing Scenes as Neural Radiance Fields for View Synthesis with multi-device GPU/TPU support.
  • Big Transfer (BiT)stars1.4k - Implementation of Big Transfer (BiT): General Visual Representation Learning.
  • JAX RLstars385 - Implementations of reinforcement learning algorithms.
  • gMLPstars2 - Implementation of Pay Attention to MLPs.
  • MLP Mixerstars8 - Minimal implementation of MLP-Mixer: An all-MLP Architecture for Vision.
  • Distributed Shampoo - Implementation of Second Order Optimization Made Practical.
  • NesTstars164 - Official implementation of Aggregating Nested Transformers.
  • XMC-GANstars90 - Official implementation of Cross-Modal Contrastive Learning for Text-to-Image Generation.
  • FNet - Official implementation of FNet: Mixing Tokens with Fourier Transforms.
  • GFSA - Official implementation of Learning Graph Structure With A Finite-State Automaton Layer.
  • IPA-GNN - Official implementation of Learning to Execute Programs with Instruction Pointer Attention Graph Neural Networks.
  • Flax Models - Collection of models and methods implemented in Flax.
  • Protein LM - Implements BERT and autoregressive models for proteins, as described in Biological Structure and Function Emerge from Scaling Unsupervised Learning to 250 Million Protein Sequences and ProGen: Language Modeling for Protein Generation.
  • Slot Attention - Reference implementation for Differentiable Patch Selection for Image Recognition.
  • Vision Transformerstars6k - Official implementation of An Image is Worth 16x16 Words: Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale.
  • FID computationstars13 - Port of mseitzer/pytorch-fidstars2k to Flax.

    • Models and Projects

    Haiku

  • AlphaFoldstars9.3k - Implementation of the inference pipeline of AlphaFold v2.0, presented in Highly accurate protein structure prediction with AlphaFold.
  • Adversarial Robustness - Reference code for Uncovering the Limits of Adversarial Training against Norm-Bounded Adversarial Examples and Fixing Data Augmentation to Improve Adversarial Robustness.
  • Bootstrap Your Own Latent - Implementation for the paper Bootstrap your own latent: A new approach to self-supervised Learning.
  • Gated Linear Networks - GLNs are a family of backpropagation-free neural networks.
  • Glassy Dynamics - Open source implementation of the paper Unveiling the predictive power of static structure in glassy systems.
  • MMV - Code for the models in Self-Supervised MultiModal Versatile Networks.
  • Normalizer-Free Networks - Official Haiku implementation of NFNets.
  • NuXstars72 - Normalizing flows with JAX.
  • OGB-LSC - This repository contains DeepMind's entry to the PCQM4M-LSC (quantum chemistry) and MAG240M-LSC (academic graph)

    • Models and Projects

    Trax

  • Reformer - Implementation of the Reformer (efficient transformer) architecture.

    • Videos

  • JAX, Flax & Transformers 🤗 - 3 days of talks around JAX / Flax, Transformers, large-scale language modeling and other great topics.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Jul 19th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • JAXoptstars571 - Hardware accelerated (GPU/TPU), batchable and differentiable optimizers in JAX.
  • PIXstars283 - PIX is an image processing library in JAX, for JAX.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Jul 14th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

  • NetKetstars393 - Machine Learning toolbox for Quantum Physics.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Jun 13th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • exojaxstars24 - Automatic differentiable spectrum modeling of exoplanets/brown dwarfs compatible to JAX.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Jun 12th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • CR.Sparsestars48 - XLA accelerated algorithms for sparse representations and compressive sensing.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Jun 9th, 2021
item.description:
Tutorials and Blog Posts

  • Writing an MCMC sampler in JAX by Jeremie Coullon - Tutorial on the different ways to write an MCMC sampler in JAX along with speed benchmarks.
  • How to add a progress bar to JAX scans and loops by Jeremie Coullon - Tutorial on how to add a progress bar to compiled loops in JAX using the host_callback module.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Jun 7th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • flaxmodelsstars157 - Pretrained models for Jax/Flax.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Jun 6th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • jaxliestars149 - Lie theory library for rigid body transformations and optimization.
  • BRAXstars1.4k - Differentiable physics engine to simulate environments along with learning algorithms to train agents for these environments.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax May 30th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • delta PVstars40 - A photovoltaic simulator with automatic differentation.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax May 21st, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

  • Coaxstars116 - Turn RL papers into code, the easy way.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Apr 26th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

  • TensorLystars1.3k - Tensor learning made simple.
  • Distraxstars356 - Reimplementation of TensorFlow Probability, containing probability distributions and bijectors.
  • cvxpylayersstars1.4k - Construct differentiable convex optimization layers.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Mar 21st, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • Optimal Transport Toolsstars218 - Toolbox that bundles utilities to solve optimal transport problems.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Mar 7th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

  • RLaxstars917 - Library for implementing reinforcement learning agents.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Mar 3rd, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • FlaxVisionstars38 - Flax version of TorchVision.
  • Oryx - Probabilistic programming language based on program transformations.

    • Videos

  • Solving y=mx+b with Jax on a TPU Pod slice - Mat Kelcey - A four part YouTube tutorial series with Colab notebooks that starts with Jax fundamentals and moves up to training with a data parallel approach on a v3-32 TPU Pod slice.

    • Tutorials and Blog Posts

  • Evolved channel selection by Mat Kelcey - Trains a classification model robust to different combinations of input channels at different resolutions, then uses a genetic algorithm to decide the best combination for a particular loss.
  • Deterministic ADVI in JAX by Martin Ingram - Walk through of implementing automatic differentiation variational inference (ADVI) easily and cleanly with JAX.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Feb 22nd, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • imaxstars29 - Image augmentations and transformations.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Feb 8th, 2021
item.description:
Tutorials and Blog Posts

  • Exploring hyperparameter meta-loss landscapes with JAX by Luke Metz - Demonstrates how to use JAX to perform inner-loss optimization with SGD and Momentum, outer-loss optimization with gradients, and outer-loss optimization using evolutionary strategies.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Feb 7th, 2021
item.description:
Tutorials and Blog Posts

  • Evolving Neural Networks in JAX by Robert Tjarko Lange - Explores how JAX can power the next generation of scalable neuroevolution algorithms.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Feb 3rd, 2021
item.description:
Tutorials and Blog Posts

  • Out of distribution (OOD) detection by Mat Kelcey - Implements different methods for OOD detection.
  • Extending JAX with custom C++ and CUDA code by Dan Foreman-Mackeystars227 - Tutorial demonstrating the infrastructure required to provide custom ops in JAX.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Jan 29th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

  • NumPyrostars1.5k - Probabilistic programming based on the Pyro library.
  • Chexstars475 - Utilities to write and test reliable JAX code.
  • Optaxstars875 - Gradient processing and optimization library.
  • JAX, M.D.stars813 - Accelerated, differential molecular dynamics.

    • Libraries

    New Libraries

  • jax-unirepstars90 - Library implementing the UniRep model for protein machine learning applications.
  • jax-cosmostars108 - Differentiable cosmology library.

    • Videos

  • Introduction to JAX - Simple neural network from scratch in JAX.

    • Papers

  • Compiling machine learning programs via high-level tracing. Roy Frostig, Matthew James Johnson, Chris Leary. MLSys 2018. - White paper describing an early version of JAX, detailing how computation is traced and compiled.

    • Tutorials and Blog Posts

  • Plugging Into JAX by Nick Doiron - Compares Flax, Haiku, and Objax on the Kaggle flower classification challenge.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Jan 23rd, 2021
item.description:
Models and Projects

JAX

  • Fourier Feature Networksstars886 - Official implementation of Fourier Features Let Networks Learn High Frequency Functions in Low Dimensional Domains.

    • Videos

  • NeurIPS 2020: JAX Ecosystem Meetup - JAX, its use at DeepMind, and discussion between engineers, scientists, and JAX core team.
  • JAX: Accelerated Machine Learning Research | SciPy 2020 | VanderPlas - JAX's core design, how it's powering new research, and how you can start using it.
  • Bayesian Programming with JAX + NumPyro — Andy Kitchen - Introduction to Bayesian modelling using NumPyro.
  • JAX on Cloud TPUs | NeurIPS 2020 | Skye Wanderman-Milne and James Bradbury - Presentation of TPU host access with demo.
  • Deep Implicit Layers - Neural ODEs, Deep Equilibirum Models, and Beyond | NeurIPS 2020 - Tutorial created by Zico Kolter, David Duvenaud, and Matt Johnson with Colab notebooks avaliable in Deep Implicit Layers.

    • Papers

  • JAX, M.D.: A Framework for Differentiable Physics. Samuel S. Schoenholz, Ekin D. Cubuk. NeurIPS 2020. - Introduces JAX, M.D., a differentiable physics library which includes simulation environments, interaction potentials, neural networks, and more.
  • Enabling Fast Differentially Private SGD via Just-in-Time Compilation and Vectorization. Pranav Subramani, Nicholas Vadivelu, Gautam Kamath. arXiv 2020. - Uses JAX's JIT and VMAP to achieve faster differentially private than existing libraries.

    • Tutorials and Blog Posts

  • Using JAX to accelerate our research by David Budden and Matteo Hessel - Describes the state of JAX and the JAX ecosystem at DeepMind.
  • Getting started with JAX (MLPs, CNNs & RNNs) by Robert Lange - Neural network building blocks from scratch with the basic JAX operators.
  • Tutorial: image classification with JAX and Flax Linen by 8bitmp3stars16 - Learn how to create a simple convolutional network with the Linen API by Flax and train it to recognize handwritten digits.
  • Meta-Learning in 50 Lines of JAX by Eric Jang - Introduction to both JAX and Meta-Learning.
  • Normalizing Flows in 100 Lines of JAX by Eric Jang - Concise implementation of RealNVP.
  • Differentiable Path Tracing on the GPU/TPU by Eric Jang - Tutorial on implementing path tracing.
  • Ensemble networks by Mat Kelcey - Ensemble nets are a method of representing an ensemble of models as one single logical model.
  • Understanding Autodiff with JAX by Srihari Radhakrishna - Understand how autodiff works using JAX.
  • From PyTorch to JAX: towards neural net frameworks that purify stateful code by Sabrina J. Mielke - Showcases how to go from a PyTorch-like style of coding to a more Functional-style of coding.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Jan 5th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • mpi4jaxstars218 - Combine MPI operations with your Jax code on CPUs and GPUs.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Jan 1st, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • Neural Network Libraries
    • FedJAXstars198 - Federated learning in JAX, built on Optax and Haiku.
    • Equivariant MLPstars194 - Construct equivariant neural network layers.
    • jax-resnetstars77 - Implementations and checkpoints for ResNet variants in Flax.
    • Parallaxstars156 - Immutable Torch Modules for JAX.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Dec 28th, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

New Libraries

  • efaxstars33 - Exponential Families in JAX.
  • jax-flowsstars212 - Normalizing flows in JAX.
  • sklearn-jax-kernelsstars32 - scikit-learn kernel matrices using JAX.

    • Models and Projects

    JAX

  • jaxnsstars75 - Nested sampling in JAX.
  • kalman-jaxstars82 - Approximate inference for Markov (i.e., temporal) Gaussian processes using iterated Kalman filtering and smoothing.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Dec 21st, 2020
item.description:
Videos

  • JAX: Accelerated machine-learning research via composable function transformations in Python | NeurIPS 2019 | Skye Wanderman-Milne - JAX intro presentation in Program Transformations for Machine Learning workshop.

item.title: n2cholas/awesome-jax Dec 20th, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

  • Neural Network Libraries
    • Flaxstars3.6k - Centered on flexibility and clarity.
    • Haikustars2.2k - Focused on simplicity, created by the authors of Sonnet at DeepMind.
    • Objaxstars720 - Has an object oriented design similar to PyTorch.
    • Elegy - A High Level API for Deep Learning in JAX. Supports Flax, Haiku, and Optax.
    • Traxstars7.1k - "Batteries included" deep learning library focused on providing solutions for common workloads.
    • Jraphstars1k - Lightweight graph neural network library.
    • Neural Tangentsstars1.9k - High-level API for specifying neural networks of both finite and infinite width.
    • HuggingFacestars72.1k - Ecosystem of pretrained Transformers for a wide range of natural language tasks (Flax).
    • Equinoxstars829 - Callable PyTrees and filtered JIT/grad transformations => neural networks in JAX.

    • Community

  • JAX GitHub Discussions
  • Reddit
